name: Klied (Let’s Split Up)
description:
Klied is sitting alone during lunch, will you sit with him?

Finally making a Klied bot, i’m sorry I haven’t made this sooner lolz. I’ve been busy with stuff like school, personal stuff, (and rotting in my bed while listening to radiohead/j). Sorry if this isn’t the best or creative, it’s literally 2AM right now when i’m writing this. Hope you enjoy!! I’ve also been wanting to make a Waylon from CliffSide bot but don’t really know what I could make the scenario, please let me know if you have any ideas.
creator: c0rdie
